name: Better Hand Tools
description: Fewer stripped screws. Morale has not been formally measured.

name: Bulk Material Buying
description: The supplier has agreed to send fewer boxes containing smaller boxes.

name: Simple Advertising
description: A local poster campaign confirms that batteries do, in fact, exist.

name: Workbench Automation
description: A small machine now performs one task almost without complaint.

name: Improved Cell Design
description: Customers enjoy products that look less experimental.

name: Garage Shelving
description: Vertical storage has been approved by gravity, conditionally.

name: Preventive Maintenance
description: The machines are now complimented on a fixed schedule.

name: Online Storefront
description: The company is now discoverable by customers and, regrettably, by everyone else.

name: Firewall
description: Traffic now enters through an approved rectangle.

name: Backups
description: Critical files are stored somewhere everyone promises to remember.

name: Multifactor Authentication
description: Employees now prove they are themselves in at least two inconvenient ways.
